title: Retail Traders Rush to Buy the Dip in Beaten-Down Software Stocks
description: Wall Street has been dumping software stocks over artificial intelligence disruption fears, but non-professional investors have been snapping them up.
content: Wall Street has been dumping software stocks over artificial intelligence disruption fears, but non-professional investors have been snapping them up.
